title: A 10-mile ride turned into a 1,000-mile spiritual quest - Adam Brown
summary: Dwarkesh Patel interviews Adam Brown about a personal journey that expanded from a 10-mile ride into a 1000-mile spiritual quest. The episode explores themes of personal transformation and discovery.
